name: yerba mate
summary: Mechanism context: caffeine/theobromine adenosine-receptor antagonism, chlorogenic-acid antioxidant signaling, AMPK-related metabolic signaling. Safety: Contains caffeine; excess intake may worsen insomnia, anxiety, palpitations, reflux, or blood pressure. Avoid very hot maté consumption patterns and stimulant stacking.. Interactions tracked: Additive effects with stimulants, caffeine, theophylline.

interactions: CYP1A2-modulating drugs may alter caffeine exposure.
preparation: Prefer moderate-temperature tea/extracts with disclosed caffeine content; avoid very hot repeated consumption and energy-drink style stacking.
